recommendations.title: Carol
recommendations.overview: In 1950s New York, a department-store clerk who dreams of a better life falls for an older, married woman.

recommendations.title: Dark Waters
recommendations.overview: A tenacious attorney uncovers a dark secret that connects a growing number of unexplained deaths to one of the world's largest corporations. In the process, he risks everything — his future, his family, and his own life — to expose the truth.

recommendations.title: Safe
recommendations.overview: Carol White, a Los Angeles housewife in the late 1980s, comes down with a debilitating illness with no clear diagnosis.

recommendations.title: May December
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under the pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past.

recommendations.title: Far from Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Connecticut, a housewife's life is upended by a marital crisis and mounting racial tensions in society.

recommendations.title: The Velvet Underground
recommendations.overview: Experience the iconic rock band's legacy in the first major documentary to tell their story. Directed with the era’s avant-garde spirit by Todd Haynes, this kaleidoscopic oral history combines exclusive interviews with dazzling archival footage.

recommendations.title: Wonderstruck
recommendations.overview: The story of a young boy in the Midwest is told simultaneously with a tale about a young girl in New York from fifty years ago as they both seek the same mysterious connection.

recommendations.title: I'm Not There
recommendations.overview: Six actors portray six personas of music legend Bob Dylan in scenes depicting various stages of his life, chronicling his rise from unknown folksinger to international icon and revealing how Dylan constantly reinvented himself.

recommendations.title: Almost Famous
recommendations.overview: In 1973, 15-year-old William Miller's unabashed love of music and aspiration to become a rock journalist lands him an assignment from Rolling Stone magazine to interview and tour with the up-and-coming band, Stillwater.

recommendations.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
recommendations.overview: Singer Freddie Mercury, guitarist Brian May, drummer Roger Taylor and bass guitarist John Deacon take the music world by storm when they form the rock 'n' roll band Queen in 1970. Hit songs become instant classics. When Mercury's increasingly wild li
